title: Fixes & Stuff
description: A replication of Actions & Stuff from Bedrock Edition to Java Edition, as best as possible with mods.
body:
# Fixes & Stuff!
*Actions & Stuff.. for Java Edition!*

**Venture out in your world.. with textures and features replicating Actions & Stuff from Bedrock Edition!**

## Usage
* Download the pack. It works out of the box!

## Customizability

* Simple Voice Chat is inside of the pack and enabled by default, but you can turn it off if you please!

* If you are not content with one of the resource packs, they can be disabled, along with Essential if you do not want it!

---
# Credits
**Thanks to everyone who made these mods/resource packs for making this modpack possible! If you have any concerns or want a mod taken off please contact my Discord, @despair.xz**

**Big thanks to [Vanilla Perfected](https://modrinth.com/modpack/vanilla-perfected) and [Fresh and Smooth](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fresh-smooth) for some of the packs used aswell!**

# FAQ
**Do I need to sort the resource packs?**
* No, the resource packs are already set up. All you need to do is change your settings to your liking.
